label: Software Engineer (AI Platform) at Replika
headline: Software Engineer (AI Platform) — LLM Orchestration, Python, & Scalable Backend Architectures

storable.title: Software Engineer II (Backend & Services)
description: Architected and maintained .NET Core services using Hangfire and PostgreSQL to manage high-frequency background jobs and real-time data synchronization.
Engineered background processing pipelines and APIs to maintain sub-second data consistency across global web and desktop products.
Collaborated with product teams to triage high-traffic production issues and refactor bottlenecked legacy code for increased reliability.
Established performance-driven unit testing patterns to ensure stability during the rapid expansion of service boundaries.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer (Architecture & Scalability)
description: Led the delivery of high-availability lab software platforms supporting complex, user-defined data models and high-throughput audit trails.
Designed and implemented microservice-style WebAPI endpoints with RESTful OData, optimizing for data lineage and traceability in regulated environments.
Directed release engineering and DevOps practices using Azure, ensuring reliable CI/CD and database migration across multiple environments.
Mentored engineering teams through code reviews and collaborative architectural design to raise the bar for system performance.

solid-earth.title: Software Architect (High-Performance Systems)
description: Developed and tuned RETS client/server software, achieving recognition as one of the fastest and most compliant servers in the US real estate industry.
Optimized protocol compliance and data handling to ensure reliable real-time broker and MLS integrations.
Built a market analytics module to surface deep statistical metrics from high-volume datasets for brokers and administrators.

litton-avondale.title: Engineering Systems Developer
description: Wrote low-level 3D-to-2D code transformations for complex engineering drawing data, focusing on transformation efficiency and accuracy.
Built a custom IDE for scripting and automating transformations, allowing engineers to iterate on geometry requirements without manual code rewrites.
Managed the deployment of networked applications and created robust error logging/reporting databases to monitor transformation runs.
